## Summary

<!-- What changed and why (1–3 sentences). -->

## Company

<!-- e.g. concise | concise-sealed | nt-ministry | healthbrew | estimateproof | campaign-receipts | cliros | shared | infrastructure -->

## Evidence

- [ ] **Change scope:** bullets map to what was actually changed.
- [ ] **Code / content proof:** commit SHAs or file paths reviewers can grep.
- [ ] **Verification:** smallest check you ran — command + exit code, URL + HTTP status, or brief output excerpt (**no secrets**).
- [ ] **Screenshots / links:** attach only when they materially help review.

## Risk & rollback

<!-- What could break and how we revert (e.g. `git revert` range). -->

## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] No credentials or tokens in commits, logs, PR body, or images.
